ham.subject: Your Amazon order #123-4567890-1234567 has shipped
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

Your order has been shipped and is on its way to you.

Order details:
- Order number: 123-4567890-1234567
- Items: 1x "Wireless Mouse" (Qty: 1)
- Shipping method: Standard Shipping
- Estimated delivery: 3-5 business days

Tracking information:
Please click the following link to track your package: <URL>

If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to reply to this email or contact our Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Verify Your Account to Prevent Suspension
spam.body:
Dear Alex,

We have detected suspicious activity on your account. In order to protect your personal information, we have temporarily suspended your access.

To restore your account, please verify your identity by clicking the link below and following the instructions:

<URL>

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your account will be permanently disabled.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
IT Support Team
